title: Pennies from Heaven
writer: Katherine Leslie Moore, William Rankin, Jo Swerling
actors: Bing Crosby, Madge Evans, Edith Fellows
plot: Larry Poole, in prison on a false charge, promise an inmate that when he gets out he will look up and help out a family. The family turns out to be a young girl, Patsy Smith, and her elderly grandfather who need lots of help.
